text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking along the river bank, I hear some
lively voices coming from behind me.

text_block_list.name: Five Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Rock, paper, scissors, shoot!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Everyone threw out rock—except for El.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Impossible! Grrr... When we reach the next streetlight, victory is mine!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Okay, hand over the baggage, King! It's my turn
to carry it. Vamos!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm finally free of that burden! Careful, El.
With this game, if you lose even once—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And so, King escapes the loop of endless losses in
bag-carrying rock, paper, scissors. Unfortunately,
however, at the next streetlight...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Stop right there! I'll thank you not to make such
ominous statements!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But after we get all this stuff back to the dorm,
we're going to have a carrot party together!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm so glad the weather's nice today.
There's nothing like enjoying carrot sticks out in
the fresh air! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But you know, now that I think about it, Spe and
Grass are the only ones who haven't lost a game
yet, right?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh... Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... In that case, how about we settle things in
the next match, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wha?! H-hang on, Grass!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Rrraaaghhh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Argh, the four of you are mucho slow! I'm already at the next light!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Well then, Spe, I'll be going on ahead as
well...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Grass?! Wait, you're too fast!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So, Sky... I presume that was a deliberate attempt to motivate Grass back there, yes?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? I dunno what you mean... I just noticed
that some people hadn't had a turn carrying the
bags yet. That's all, honest.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And besides, no matter which one of those two
wins the next match, and the match after that, we
won't have to worry about carrying those bags
again.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmph... So that's your strategy?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
No, no, I just have faith in them is all. They're
such good girls, you know?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You really are something else, Sky.
